attributes.description: Workload monitoring with Deployments, DaemonSets, StatefulSets, Jobs, container restart trends, and deployment drilldowns.

embeddableConfig.description: Navigation links to other K8s dashboards.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

embeddableConfig.description: Total number of deployments with available replica metrics, based on distinct deployment names observed in the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name != ""
| STATS
    restarts_per = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_restarts = SUM(restarts_per)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name != ""
| STATS
    restarts_per = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_restarts = SUM(restarts_per)

embeddableConfig.description: Total container restarts across all pods, summed from the maximum restart count per container observed in the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.name != ""
  AND (
    k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
    OR k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  )
| EVAL is_deploy_doc = CASE(k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)
| INLINE STATS latest_deploy_ts = MAX(CASE(is_deploy_doc == 1, @timestamp, NULL))
    BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL keep_deploy = CASE(
    is_deploy_doc == 1 AND @timestamp == latest_deploy_ts, 1,
    is_deploy_doc == 0, 1,
    0)
| WHERE keep_deploy == 1
| STATS
    available = MAX(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired   = MAX(k8s.deployment.desired),
    max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name,
     k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS
    available = MAX(available),
    desired   = MAX(desired),
    restarts  = SUM(max_restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, 0),
    availability = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(available) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL)
| SORT availability ASC, restarts DESC

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.name != ""
  AND (
    k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
    OR k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  )
| EVAL is_deploy_doc = CASE(k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)
| INLINE STATS latest_deploy_ts = MAX(CASE(is_deploy_doc == 1, @timestamp, NULL))
    BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL keep_deploy = CASE(
    is_deploy_doc == 1 AND @timestamp == latest_deploy_ts, 1,
    is_deploy_doc == 0, 1,
    0)
| WHERE keep_deploy == 1
| STATS
    available = MAX(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired   = MAX(k8s.deployment.desired),
    max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name,
     k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS
    available = MAX(available),
    desired   = MAX(desired),
    restarts  = SUM(max_restarts)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, 0),
    availability = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(available) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL)
| SORT availability ASC, restarts DESC

embeddableConfig.description: Deployments ranked by availability (lowest first). Click a deployment name to drill into deployment details, a namespace to drill into namespace details, or a cluster to drill into cluster details. Availability = available replicas ÷ desired replicas. Available and desired replica counts are latest values. Container restarts = sum across all pods and containers over the selected time range.

query.esql:
TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.name != ""
  AND (
    k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
    OR k8s.deployment.desired IS NOT NULL
  )
| STATS
    avail_per = MAX(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired_per = MAX(k8s.deployment.desired)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name,
     k8s.namespace.name,
     k8s.deployment.name
| STATS
    available = SUM(avail_per),
    desired = SUM(desired_per)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, available, desired

TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.name != ""
  AND (
    k8s.deployment.available IS NOT NULL
    OR k8s.deployment.desired IS NOT NULL
  )
| STATS
    avail_per = MAX(k8s.deployment.available),
    desired_per = MAX(k8s.deployment.desired)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
     k8s.cluster.name,
     k8s.namespace.name,
     k8s.deployment.name
| STATS
    available = SUM(avail_per),
    desired = SUM(desired_per)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, available, desired

embeddableConfig.description: Total available and desired deployment replica counts across all clusters, summed per time bucket.
embeddableConfig.title: Deployment replicas over time

query.esql:
TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.name != ""
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name != ""
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
       k8s.cluster.name,
       k8s.namespace.name,
       k8s.deployment.name,
       k8s.pod.uid,
       k8s.container.name
| STATS total_restarts = SUM(max_restarts)
    BY timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL deployment_id = CONCAT(k8s.cluster.name, "/", k8s.namespace.name, "/", k8s.deployment.name)
| SORT timestamp ASC, total_restarts DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp

TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.name != ""
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name != ""
  AND k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts)
    BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend),
       k8s.cluster.name,
       k8s.namespace.name,
       k8s.deployment.name,
       k8s.pod.uid,
       k8s.container.name
| STATS total_restarts = SUM(max_restarts)
    BY timestamp, k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.deployment.name
| EVAL deployment_id = CONCAT(k8s.cluster.name, "/", k8s.namespace.name, "/", k8s.deployment.name)
| SORT timestamp ASC, total_restarts DESC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp

embeddableConfig.description: Top 10 deployments by total container restarts over time (per time bucket). Restarts use the latest count per container in each bucket, summed across all pods and containers for each deployment (by cluster, namespace, and deployment name). Values reflect cumulative restart counts, not new restarts in the interval.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 deployments by container restarts

query.esql:
TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.daemonset.name != ""
  AND (
    k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL
    OR k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL
  )
| STATS
    current_scheduled = MAX(k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes),
    desired_scheduled = MAX(k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes),
    ready = MAX(k8s.daemonset.ready_nodes)
  BY k8s.cluster.name,
     k8s.namespace.name,
     k8s.daemonset.name,
     timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    `Current scheduled` = SUM(current_scheduled),
    `Desired scheduled` = SUM(desired_scheduled),
    Ready = SUM(ready)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Desired scheduled`, `Current scheduled`, Ready

TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.daemonset.name != ""
  AND (
    k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL
    OR k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL
  )
| STATS
    current_scheduled = MAX(k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes),
    desired_scheduled = MAX(k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes),
    ready = MAX(k8s.daemonset.ready_nodes)
  BY k8s.cluster.name,
     k8s.namespace.name,
     k8s.daemonset.name,
     timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    `Current scheduled` = SUM(current_scheduled),
    `Desired scheduled` = SUM(desired_scheduled),
    Ready = SUM(ready)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Desired scheduled`, `Current scheduled`, Ready

embeddableConfig.description: Total desired and currently scheduled DaemonSet counts, plus ready node counts, across all clusters, summed per time bucket
embeddableConfig.title: DaemonSet scheduling over time

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.daemonset.name != ""
  AND k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.daemonset.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    current      = MAX(k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes),
    desired      = MAX(k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes),
    ready        = MAX(k8s.daemonset.ready_nodes),
    misscheduled = MAX(k8s.daemonset.misscheduled_nodes)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.daemonset.name
| EVAL
    availability = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(ready) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL)
| SORT availability asc, misscheduled desc

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.daemonset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.daemonset.name != ""
  AND k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.daemonset.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    current      = MAX(k8s.daemonset.current_scheduled_nodes),
    desired      = MAX(k8s.daemonset.desired_scheduled_nodes),
    ready        = MAX(k8s.daemonset.ready_nodes),
    misscheduled = MAX(k8s.daemonset.misscheduled_nodes)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.daemonset.name
| EVAL
    availability = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(ready) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL)
| SORT availability asc, misscheduled desc

embeddableConfig.description: DaemonSets ranked by misscheduled node count (highest first). Click a DaemonSet name to see its pods, a namespace to drill into namespace details, or a cluster to drill into cluster details. Availability = ready ÷ desired. All counts reflect the latest collected values.
embeddableConfig.title: DaemonSets

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.statefulset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.statefulset.name != ""
  AND k8s.statefulset.desired_pods IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.statefulset.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    current = MAX(k8s.statefulset.current_pods),
    desired = MAX(k8s.statefulset.desired_pods),
    ready   = MAX(k8s.statefulset.ready_pods),
    updated = MAX(k8s.statefulset.updated_pods)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.statefulset.name
| EVAL
    availability = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(ready) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL),
    not_ready = COALESCE(desired, 0) - COALESCE(ready, 0),
    not_updated = COALESCE(desired, 0) - COALESCE(updated, 0)
| SORT  availability ASC, not_ready DESC,not_updated DESC, k8s.statefulset.name ASC

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.statefulset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.statefulset.name != ""
  AND k8s.statefulset.desired_pods IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.statefulset.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    current = MAX(k8s.statefulset.current_pods),
    desired = MAX(k8s.statefulset.desired_pods),
    ready   = MAX(k8s.statefulset.ready_pods),
    updated = MAX(k8s.statefulset.updated_pods)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.statefulset.name
| EVAL
    availability = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(ready) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL),
    not_ready = COALESCE(desired, 0) - COALESCE(ready, 0),
    not_updated = COALESCE(desired, 0) - COALESCE(updated, 0)
| SORT  availability ASC, not_ready DESC,not_updated DESC, k8s.statefulset.name ASC

embeddableConfig.description: ReplicaSets ranked by availability (lowest first). Click a ReplicaSet name to see its pods, a namespace to drill into namespace details, or a cluster to drill into cluster details. Availability = ( available / desired replicas). All counts reflect the latest collected values
embeddableConfig.title: StatefulSets

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.job.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.job.name != ""
  AND k8s.job.active_pods IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.job.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    active     = MAX(k8s.job.active_pods),
    successful = MAX(k8s.job.successful_pods),
    failed     = MAX(k8s.job.failed_pods),
    desired    = MAX(k8s.job.desired_successful_pods)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.job.name
| EVAL
    completion = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(successful) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL),
    remaining = COALESCE(desired, 0) - COALESCE(successful, 0)
| SORT failed DESC, remaining DESC, completion ASC, k8s.job.name ASC

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.namespace.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.namespace.name != ""
  AND k8s.job.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.job.name != ""
  AND k8s.job.active_pods IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.job.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    active     = MAX(k8s.job.active_pods),
    successful = MAX(k8s.job.successful_pods),
    failed     = MAX(k8s.job.failed_pods),
    desired    = MAX(k8s.job.desired_successful_pods)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.namespace.name, k8s.job.name
| EVAL
    completion = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(successful) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL),
    remaining = COALESCE(desired, 0) - COALESCE(successful, 0)
| SORT failed DESC, remaining DESC, completion ASC, k8s.job.name ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Jobs ranked by failed pods (highest first), then by remaining completions. Click a Job name to see its pods, a namespace to drill into namespace details, or a cluster to drill into cluster details. Completion = successful ÷ desired pods. All pod counts reflect the latest collected values.
embeddableConfig.title: Jobs

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.replicaset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.replicaset.available IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.replicaset.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    k8s.cluster.name = MAX(k8s.cluster.name),
    available = MAX(k8s.replicaset.available),
    desired   = MAX(k8s.replicaset.desired)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.replicaset.name
| EVAL
    availability = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(available) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL),
    not_available = COALESCE(desired, 0) - COALESCE(available, 0)
| SORT not_available DESC, availability ASC, k8s.replicaset.name ASC

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.replicaset.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.replicaset.available IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.replicaset.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    k8s.cluster.name = MAX(k8s.cluster.name),
    available = MAX(k8s.replicaset.available),
    desired   = MAX(k8s.replicaset.desired)
  BY k8s.namespace.name, k8s.replicaset.name
| EVAL
    availability = CASE(
      desired IS NOT NULL AND desired > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(available) / TO_DOUBLE(desired), 4),
      NULL),
    not_available = COALESCE(desired, 0) - COALESCE(available, 0)
| SORT not_available DESC, availability ASC, k8s.replicaset.name ASC

embeddableConfig.description: ReplicaSets sorted by unavailable replicas (desired minus available), then by availability. Shows available and desired pod counts from the latest collected data for each ReplicaSet. Click a row to drill down.
embeddableConfig.title: ReplicaSets

attributes.title: [Kubernetes OTel] Workloads
